Bloomberg Terminal — function density, Launchpad, orange-on-black

Clawmachine-fit: S. The top reference for hostile-density UI as operator asset. Orange-on-black + monospace + single-letter function codes are the cultural keystones.

Credits: Bloomberg LP company blog, Investopedia, Lippincott Library (Wharton), Matthew Strom.. Internal non-commercial fair-use research reference. Do not redistribute.
